title: Moonlit Resourcepack
description: Moonlit is a visually enhanced resource pack that brings a unique glow to your Minecraft experience. It features emissive textures for weapons, tools, ores, armor, and beds, making them stand out even in the darkest environments.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e449560054a9f200ce6efd13ace561d5430f052.png)🌙✨ Moonlit Resource Pack ✨🌙

🌌 Step into a glowing, magical Minecraft experience! 🌌

Moonlit is a visually enhanced resource pack that adds a ✨ mystical touch to your world. With emissive textures 🌟 for weapons ⚔️, tools 🔧, ores ⛏️, armor 🛡️, and beds 🛏️ — everything softly glows in the dark, creating an atmosphere that’s truly otherworldly. 🌑💫

But the magic doesn’t stop there! 🎨
Moonlit also features a custom hotbar 🎛️, a unique hunger bar 🍗, and color-tinted GUI elements 🎮 for a UI that feels fresh, sleek, and immersive.

➕ Bonus Features
🔍 Invisible Item Frames – Perfect for clean, seamless decoration! 🖼️✨
🪧 Invisible Crimson Signs – For a modern, minimal look! 🏷️🔮

💜 Perfect for players who love a sleek, glowing, and atmospheric aesthetic! 🌠

🌐 Now with a Community Server!
Come experience Moonlit together – build, explore, and glow with us!

This is an outdated project, please follow my new protject down here
Youtube Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Sst8i1GmMks

[![Available on curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/5irZvXi.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sunlit)
